# C3 / C4 Boundary

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerruntimeresponsibilitydocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to runtime responsibility](../runtime-responsibility.md)

| Layer | Owns | C4 rule |
| --- | --- | --- |
| C3 Provider Capability | ProviderCapability, fingerprint, catalog vocabulary | C4 imports read-only and must not redefine it |
| C4 Provider Runtime | Adapter port, process command, parser, raw event draft | C4 emits drafts and local evidence only |
| C5 Scheduling | Runtime lease and assignment scheduling | C4 consumes assignment input after lease decisions |

The dependency direction is C4 toward contracts vocabulary. Reverse imports from agentbridge into concrete providers or scheduling policy are boundary violations.
